privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env compare_battery_chemistries_npv task by confirming the task relies on a generative SAM simulation. Verified the expected JSON and artifact filenames exactly match the explicit instructions and export_result.sh script. Verified the min/max bounds for the target PV system size (5.0 kW) and battery capacity (10.0 kWh) match the task instructions. Discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is completely missing from the task environment, rendering the task programmatically unscorable.
